prompt: Cinematic hyper-realistic fashion portrait. A young adult female with long, voluminous casual black hair, reclining on a large matte black leather corner sofa in a serene modern interior. Mid-right position, the sofa extends widely across the lower half of the frame. Smooth fair skin, delicate features, almond-shaped dark eyes, soft brow shape, slight cat-eye eyeliner, natural rose-red lip color, subtle makeup. Calm, detached, contemplative expression—head turned toward the right of the frame looking off-camera; torso tilted slightly toward the viewer. Arms and accessories: left arm casually draped over the raised backrest on the left—elbow bent, wrist relaxed, fingers naturally hanging over the dark leather. On the wrist is a dark blue beaded bracelet, a few delicate rings, a small pendant necklace, and fine subtle earrings. Right hand relaxed near the hip and upper thigh, partially obscured by the pose. Clothing: an oversized dark navy athletic American football jersey—subtle tonal pattern. Small white curved sportswear logo on the upper chest. Central vertical decorative geometric panel: intersecting red, subtle blue, and light grey stitching forming elongated diamonds and crosshair patterns. The jersey drapes naturally with realistic wrinkles, fabric texture, and slightly loose sleeves. Black slim-fit shorts are faintly visible beneath the jersey. Legs and footwear: elegant portrait pose—one knee prominently raised near the center-right of the frame, the other leg crossed underneath extending diagonally to the bottom right. Realistic human proportions, natural skin texture, delicate knee and ankle contours, soft highlights on the legs. Minimalist black open-toe mule sandals—thin straps, thin low heels. One shoe is clearly visible in the lower-middle part of the frame; the extended foot reaches toward the bottom right. Sofa: large, low, contemporary style—smooth charcoal black leather, large cushions, rounded upholstered armrests, visible seams, slight cool-toned reflections. Subtle compression in the cushions beneath the body. A wide sofa seat in the foreground creates depth and an intimate atmosphere. Beneath the sofa and extended foot: dark charcoal tiled floor with subtle linear gaps and a slightly textured matte finish. Background: the upper half is filled with large windows—floor-to-ceiling transparent white tulle curtains, falling in soft vertical folds, slightly gathered and uneven at the bottom edge. Bright overcast daylight filters through, creating a pale blue-grey glow. The exterior is heavily blurred and out of focus—suggesting distant city buildings or a blurry winter landscape. A dark stone or wooden windowsill extends horizontally behind the sofa. Tones and lighting: cool, low-saturation blue-grey tones—deep blacks, navy tones, light skin highlights, and restrained red accents in the jersey. Soft diffused directional light from the window slightly above and behind—gentle rim light through the hair, with delicate illumination on the face, shoulders, and legs. Deep but detailed shadows on the sofa and the lower foreground. Moody, luxurious, serene atmosphere; non-commercial bright style. Camera: slightly high-angle view, full-frame 50mm, shallow to medium depth of field—woman and nearby sofa details are sharp and clear, curtains and exterior softly blurred. Realistic skin, individual hair strands, accurate hands and feet, authentic fabric wrinkles, genuine leather texture, elegant portrait composition, high contrast, rich tonal layers, refined cinematic realism, slight film grain. Negative: no strong flash, no exaggerated glamour retouching, no text, no watermarks, no extra people, no deformed limbs, no repeating fingers, no deformed footwear, no cluttered elements.

promptZh: 电影感超写实时尚人像。一位留着蓬松长发的年轻女性（黑色长发），斜倚在宁静现代室内的一张大型哑光黑色皮质转角沙发上。位于画面中右侧，沙发在画面下半部分大面积延伸。平滑白皙的皮肤，精致的五官，杏仁状的深色眼睛，柔和的眉形，淡淡的猫眼眼线，自然的玫瑰红唇色，妆容清透。冷静、疏离、沉思的表情——头部转向画面右侧，视线看向画外；躯干微微向观众倾斜。手臂与配饰：左臂随意搭在左侧升起的靠背上——手肘弯曲，手腕放松，手指自然地垂在深色皮革上。手腕上佩戴着 深蓝色串珠手链，几枚精致的戒指，一条小吊坠项链，以及细小精致的耳环。右手放松地置于臀部和大腿上方，部分被姿势遮挡。服装：一件超大款深海军蓝美式橄榄球运动衫——带有微妙的同色系图案。胸部上方有一个白色的小型弧形运动品牌标志。中央垂直装饰性几何面板：交织的红色、微妙的蓝色和浅灰色缝线，形成拉长的菱形和十字准线图案。运动衫自然垂坠，呈现出逼真的褶皱、织物纹理和略显宽松的袖子。运动衫下方隐约可见黑色修身短裤。腿部与鞋履：优雅的人像姿势——一只膝盖在画面中右侧显著抬起，另一条腿交叉在下方，向右下方对角线延伸。逼真的人体比例，自然的皮肤纹理，精致的膝盖和脚踝轮廓，腿部有柔和的高光。极简主义黑色露趾穆勒凉鞋——细带，低细跟。一只鞋在画面中下部清晰可见；伸出的脚向右下方延伸。沙发：大型、低矮、现代风格——光滑的炭黑色皮革，大靠垫，圆润的软包扶手，可见的接缝，带有轻微的冷色调反光。身体下方的靠垫有轻微的凹陷感。前景中宽阔的沙发座营造出深度和私密的氛围。沙发和伸出的脚下方：深炭灰色瓷砖地面，带有微妙的线性缝隙和略带纹理的哑光饰面。背景：上半部分是大面积的窗户——落地透明白色薄纱窗帘，呈柔和的垂直褶皱垂下，底部略显褶皱且不平整。明亮的阴天日光透过窗户，营造出淡蓝灰色的光晕。窗外景色高度模糊且失焦——暗示着远处的城市建筑或模糊的冬季景观。一道深色的石质或木质窗台在沙发后方水平延伸。色调与光影：冷色调、低饱和度的蓝灰色——深黑色、海军蓝调、浅肤色高光，以及运动衫中克制的红色点缀。来自窗户上方和后方的柔和漫射定向光——透过发丝形成柔和的轮廓光，面部、肩部和腿部有细腻的照明。沙发和前景下方有深邃但细节丰富的阴影。情绪化、奢华、宁静的氛围；非商业化的明亮风格。相机：略微高角度拍摄，全画幅 50mm 镜头，浅至中等景深——女性和附近的沙发细节清晰锐利，窗帘和外部背景柔和模糊。逼真的皮肤，单根发丝，准确的手脚，真实的织物褶皱，纯正的皮革纹理，优雅的人像构图，高对比度，丰富的色调层次，精致的电影写实感，带有轻微的胶片颗粒感。负面提示：无强闪光，无夸张的魅力修图，无文字，无水印，无额外人物，无畸形肢体，无重复手指，无畸形鞋履，无杂乱元素。
